description_long: This is a small log cabin with a steeply pitched gable roof made of dark wood planks. The exterior walls are constructed from horizontally stacked logs, giving it a rustic and traditional appearance. The front facade features a single door with a small set of steps leading up to it, and a window is positioned to the right of the door. On the opposite side, there is a single square window, and a long, narrow wooden ramp or walkway extends from the rear. The roof overhangs the walls slightly, providing some shelter at the entrance. The overall design is compact and functional, suitable for a residential or park setting.
description: A compact log cabin with a steep gable roof, front door, and small windows, featuring a rustic wooden exterior and a rear ramp.
description_view_0: Front view showing the entrance door, a small window to the right, and the steep gable roof.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the long, narrow wooden ramp extending from the rear and the solid log wall.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the end of the ramp and a single square window on the back wall.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with the ramp extending outward and the log wall visible.
attribute_roof_type: gable roof with steep pitch, constructed from dark wooden planks and slight overhangs
attribute_window_arrangement: two small square windows, one on the front facade to the right of the door and one on the rear wall, arranged asymmetrically
attribute_door_placement: single exterior door centered on the front facade, accessed by a small set of steps
